criteria_results.evidence: execute() fills at bar.close, skips None bars, fee=0.0; covered by 2 dedicated tests.
Tracks _cash/_holdings/_last_prices; NAV = cash + sum(holding*last_price); initial_cash configurable; covered by 2 tests.
run() returns BacktestResult with keys final_nav, total_return, num_trades in metrics dict.
Constructor requires single symbol; run loop calls signal_source(self._symbol, current_date).
Loop executes: signal_source → execute → extend fills → apply_fills → snapshot, no conditional skip.
interfaces.py contains only original three Protocol contracts unchanged.
__all__ includes all 6: ExecutionModel, PortfolioBook, BacktestEngine, SimpleExecutionModel, InMemoryPortfolioBook, SymbolBacktestEngine.
5 tests in test_tw_quant_backtest_engine.py + scaffold T13 export test; all pass.
No batch execution, exit-rule, or reporting imports in engine.py.

notes: T13 implementation matches approved scope and acceptance criteria. No T14/T15/T16 logic detected.
